description: Letter from the sister of Ismāʿīl b. Barhūn al-Tāhartī, in al-Mahdiyya, to her brother Ismāʿīl b. Barhūn al-Tāhartī, in Fustat. Dating: ca. 1020. The sister describes her extravagant grief—stripping off her clothes and fasting for two months—when she heard that her brother planned to continue traveling this winter, it seems specifically to Spain. She writes about the security that has worsened in al-Mahdiyya and about the rising taxes there. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #159) VMR
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מאל-מהדיה. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
